questions.question: 单词 'stay' 的过去式是 'stayed'。
questions.explanation: 规则动词过去式直接在词尾加-ed。

questions.question: 'last weekend' 意为'下周末'。
questions.explanation: last weekend 意为'上周末'。

questions.question: 动词 'read' 的过去式拼写依然是 'read'。
questions.explanation: read的过去式是不规则变化，拼写保持原样但读音改变。

questions.question: 'I cleaned my room yesterday.' 是正确的一般过去时句子。
questions.explanation: 含有过去时间状语yesterday，动词使用过去式cleaned。

questions.question: 在句子 'Did you washed your clothes?' 中，washed 的使用是正确的。
questions.explanation: 助动词did后面必须跟动词原形，应为wash。

questions.question: I _______ a film last night.
questions.explanation: 昨晚看电影用see a film，过去时需用saw。

questions.question: —What did you do? —I ________.
questions.explanation: 由Did提问的问题，回答需使用动词过去式。

questions.question: Did you read a _______?
questions.explanation: read搭配书报杂志，magazine符合语境。

questions.question: —_______ did you go last weekend? —I went to a park.
questions.explanation: 根据回答地点a park，可知提问地点用Where。

questions.question: Mike _______ his grandparents yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday标志着一般过去时，visit变visited。

questions.question: —Did you have a cold last Monday? —________.
questions.explanation: Did引导的一般疑问句，肯定回答为Yes, I did.

questions.question: It _______ good.
questions.explanation: 描述过去发生的事情，系动词look使用过去式looked。

questions.question: I ______ fishing last Saturday.
questions.explanation: go fishing的过去式是went fishing。

questions.question: —Was the storybook interesting? —________.
questions.explanation: storybook的主语是it，was开头用was回答。

questions.question: I stayed ________ at home.
questions.explanation: stay at home all day是整天待在家。

questions.question: Yesterday I ________ (clean) my room.
questions.explanation: clean加ed形式用于过去时。

questions.question: Did you watch TV? No, I ________.
questions.explanation: 一般过去时否定的简略回答用didn't(此处要求全小写字母不含符号)。

questions.question: ________ did you do yesterday afternoon?
questions.explanation: 问做了什么事用what。

questions.question: I _______ (drink) some tea last night.
questions.explanation: drink的过去式是不规则形式drank。

questions.question: 请将下列短语与其对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: drank tea-喝茶；read a book-读书；saw a film-看电影；slept-睡觉。

questions.knowledge_point: 动词原形与过去式对应
questions.question: 请将单词原形与其过去式对应。
questions.explanation: 对应规则：wash-washed, study-studied, do-did, go-went。

questions.question: 把给出的单词排成一句话。
questions.explanation: 标准陈述句结构：主语+谓语+地点。

questions.question: 把给出的单词排成一句话。
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句结构：特殊疑问词+did+主语+动词原形？

questions.question: 一般过去时只能用来描述昨天发生的事。
questions.explanation: 过去时间可以是昨天、上周末、两年前等。

questions.question: 以辅音字母加y结尾的动词变过去式，要把y变i再加ed。
questions.explanation: 这是规则动词过去式的变化规则之一，如study-studied。

questions.question: 'watch TV' 和 'watch a show' 都是看节目的意思。
questions.explanation: watch在此处都作'观看'解。

questions.question: 在过去时疑问句中，实义动词必须用过去式。
questions.explanation: 助动词did出现后，实义动词恢复原形。

questions.question: I had a cold 意思是'我感冒了'。
questions.explanation: have/had a cold是患感冒的固定表达。

questions.question: He _____ his room last Sunday.
questions.explanation: 由last Sunday可知需要用过去式。

questions.question: What ______ you ______ last weekend?
questions.explanation: 疑问句结构为did+动词原形。

questions.question: I _____ it on TV yesterday.
questions.explanation: 看电视节目的习惯用语是watch TV，过去式为watched。

questions.question: Did you ______ any clothes?
questions.explanation: Did引导句子的动词原形用法。

questions.question: —How was your weekend? —________.
questions.explanation: How was... 询问情况，回答It was...

questions.question: The film was very ______.
questions.explanation: 用来修饰film的形容词，有趣interesting最合适。

questions.question: I had a cold, ______ I stayed at home.
questions.explanation: 前后是因果关系，表示“所以”。

questions.question: Did Sarah _____ a storybook last night?
questions.explanation: Did后跟原形，read的原形与过去式同形但此处取其原形。

questions.question: What did you do ______ your holiday?
questions.explanation: 在假期中常用on your holiday。

questions.question: Did you and your father go fishing? Yes, _____ did.
questions.explanation: you and your father 指代“你们”，回答用“我们”we。

questions.question: My father ________ (cook) dinner yesterday.
questions.explanation: cook加ed。

questions.question: I ________ (not watch) TV last night.
questions.explanation: 否定形式为didn't + 动词原形(不含标点写成didnt watch)。

questions.question: Every day I clean my room. But I ________ it yesterday.
questions.explanation: 由yesterday确定使用cleaned。

questions.question: The show was ________ (好极了).
questions.explanation: 好极了、优秀的英文是excellent。

questions.question: 匹配下列动作与含义。
questions.explanation: 短语意指：洗衣服,扫房间,待在家,看电视。

questions.question: 匹配动词与合适的名词/介词短语。
questions.explanation: 固定搭配：read a magazine, went fishing, had a cold, saw a film。

questions.question: 连词成句。
questions.explanation: 主+谓+宾结构。

questions.knowledge_point: 一般疑问句及回答语序
questions.question: 连词成句。
questions.explanation: look after 意为照顾。结构为Did+主语+动词词组+宾语。

knowledge_summary.point: 动词过去式的规则变化
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 描述过去状态或动作需要对动词进行形态变化。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 大部分动词+ed; 以e结尾+d; 辅音+y结尾变i+ed; 双写末尾字母+ed。
common_mistakes: 不论什么动词都直接加ed
knowledge_summary.tips: 记熟常用不规则动词表，如do-did, go-went, read-read, see-saw。

knowledge_summary.key_formula: 主语 + 动词过去式 + 其他 + 过去时间 (如 yesterday, last weekend)。
common_mistakes: 使用了过去时间，但动词未用过去式
在主语和动词过去式之间加了is/am/are
knowledge_summary.tips: 看到last, yesterday, ago, before等词，立刻联想过去式。

knowledge_summary.point: 一般过去时疑问句及其回答
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 询问或确认过去发生的动作。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Did + 主语 + 动词原形 + 其他? 回答：Yes, I did / No, I didn't.
common_mistakes: Did 开头的句子动词用了过去式
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住'Did出动，动还原'的口诀。
